step_by_step_thinking:
The central tendency or median for an even number of data points, such as 180, is typically found between the middle two numbers when sorted. Given that we have 180 values (an even count), the second quartile would represent this midpoint range where half of the data falls below it and half above it.

The correct answer is C: 2nd quartile. This represents the exact center point dividing our dataset into equal halves.
